issue_title: odd gridline behavior when redrawing chart (non-idempotent?)
issue_body_preview:
I'm trying to create a candlestick chart that can be scrolled by keyboard, and I redraw the chart by repeating the original drawing code with different array of data.

On some dates when there are large jumps in range I get strange non-even spacing of grid lines:

![screen shot 2017-10-12 at 4 3
test_description_zh: 创建一个带网格线的D3FC图表，使用不同数据范围多次重绘图表（例如模拟键盘滚动切换日期数据），观察当数据范围发生较大跳变时网格线的间距表现。
expected_result_zh: 每次重绘图表后，网格线应保持均匀间距分布，不应出现不均匀、错乱或重叠的网格线。多次重绘应具有幂等性，即相同数据重绘后网格线表现一致。
